summary: Iteration 15 — User-First (Trust + Revenue) verification PASS. 26/26 backend pytest pass (12 new + 14 regression). Health check 14/14 HEALTHY. Frontend end-to-end: login → PIN → home → profile menu shows 'Savings Assistant' label, Settings shows new 'Expiry alerts' card with notif-toggle, Savings Assistant screen verified for already-optimal (BPCL+fuel), recommendations + delta pills (Amazon Pay ICICI → BPCL with delta ₹6001/yr), transparency modal with vs-current-block + 'NOT counted' section, and affiliate POST /api/cards/click captures source=best, current_card_id, category, delta_inr=6001, monthly_spend_inr=10000.
critical_code_review_comments: cards.py /api/cards/best: filter is correct — recommendations exclude current_card_id AND require net_value > current_net. you_are_already_optimal flag is computed AFTER filtering (clean).

server.py _generate_dynamic_notifications: triggers only at days_left==3 OR 0<=days_left<=1 (skips redeemed). Upsert uses (user_pin, kind, ref_voucher_id) — idempotent confirmed. Stale notifications are also deleted via $nin keep_voucher_ids, which is a nice self-healing detail.
cards.py CardClickBody: all new affiliate fields (current_card_id, monthly_spend_inr, delta_inr) are Optional — graceful if frontend omits them.

Settings page: settings-pin-card and settings-biometric-card data-testids could not be found by selector (only settings-notifications-card). Biometric card is expected to be hidden in headless; the PIN card visibly renders as 'App PIN' but its data-testid (if any) doesn't match the expected token. Minor consistency note — not blocking.
Modal 'NOT counted' collapsible section confirmed present. The 'vs your current card' block (data-testid='vs-current-block') correctly appears only when a current card is set.
Affiliate POST /api/cards/click payload includes source='best', current_card_id='amazon-pay-icici', delta_inr=6001, monthly_spend_inr=10000, category='fuel' — full attribution chain working.
seed_data_creation: Test created 6 vouchers (TESTBRAND_DAYS3, DAYS1, DAYS0, DAYS2, DAYS5, REDEEMED) for unique user_pin '99XX' (timestamp-based) plus 1 card_click doc with full affiliate fields. Vouchers persist; safe to garbage-collect after expiry.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 edit-voucher PATCH-not-POST regression was not re-exercised via UI in this run (test_iter15 focused on the new Trust + User-First feature surface; iteration 13/14 covered the edit-voucher path). Backend correctness for current_card filtering and notification triggers (3 days / 0-1 days, idempotent, skips redeemed) verified by direct API tests with manufactured expiry dates. Biometric WebAuthn still cannot be exercised in headless Playwright — settings-biometric-card hidden as expected.

validations_performed.GET /api/notifications expiry triggers: days_left=3 → ending_soon; days_left∈{0,1} → urgent_expiry; days_left∈{2,5} → no notif; redeemed → no notif. PASS.
validations_performed.Notifications idempotency (2 consecutive: Same (kind, ref_voucher_id) tuples; no duplicates. PASS.
validations_performed.GET /api/cards/best fuel + current_card_: you_are_already_optimal=false, BPCL in results, delta_inr>0, current card excluded. PASS.
validations_performed.POST /api/cards/click persists current_c: Verified via direct MongoDB query. PASS.
validations_performed.Settings new 'Expiry alerts' card with n: PASS (label 'Turn off alerts' shown when enabled).
validations_performed.Apply on best recommendation POSTs /api/: PASS (sbicard.com popup; delta_inr=6001, monthly_spend_inr=10000, source=best, current_card_id=amazon-pay-icici, category=fuel).
